title: Operations Manager
raw_jd: Lead daily operations for a regional fulfillment center. Manage shift leads, improve process reliability, track service-level metrics, coordinate vendor issues, and drive continuous improvement projects. The role requires analytical problem solving, people management, and practical execution under time pressure.
expected_must_haves: People management in an operations environment
expected_disqualifiers: Cannot describe safety or quality tradeoffs
scoring_notes: Strong candidates show measurable operational improvements and balanced people/process decisions.
